chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Making up the Night Prayer

text: 1432 - وَ سَأَلَهُ سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ: عَنْ قَضَاءِ اَلْوَتْرِ بَعْدَ اَلظُّهْرِ فَقَالَ «اِقْضِهِ وَتْراً أَبَداً كَمَا فَاتَكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1432 - Sulaiman ibn Khalid asked Imam (as) about making up the Witr prayer after midday.
Imam (as) said: "Make it up as a single (Witr) always, just as it was missed."
